framework.name: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 (AIMS Framework)
framework.description: Individual I-D (not IETF-endorsed, no working group, no stream) proposing Agent Identity Management System (AIMS) that composes existing standards (SPIFFE, WIMSE, OAuth 2.0, OpenID SSF) for agent auth. Explicitly avoids new protocols — maps existing specs to agent use cases. Authors from Defakto Security, AWS, Zscaler, Ping Identity.
framework.raw_quote: This Internet-Draft is submitted... This I-D is not endorsed by the IETF and has no formal standing in the IETF standards process.

source.title: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
